creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is not a bug report, this should start as a question, posted 
to questions@freebsd.org or stable@freebsd.org. 

You should include interesting information in your /etc/rc.conf, 
with regarding to syslogd and the interface statements. 

Also, does running the command "/etc/rc.d/syslogd start" after 
bootup result in a successful start of the syslogd?
